info.name: Qikink API Copy
info.description:
Introduction to Qikink API Documentation

Welcome to the Qikink API 08-23 reference documentation. This guide will help you seamlessly integrate your websites and applications with Qikink's Print on Demand and Dropshipping services.

Qikink offers two main API endpoints: the Sandbox and Live. The Sandbox API endpoint is designed for testing purposes, while the Live API endpoint enables you to save, update, and delete data within your live Qikink account. Please note that access to the Live API endpoint is currently limited and must be requested through your dashboard at dashboard.qikink.com -> Integration -> Custom API.

To get started with our API, you'll need two important keys: the ClientId and client_secret. These keys generates you access_token to all the other endpoints.

  • The Sandbox endpoint is https://sandbox.qikink.com/

  • The Live endpoint is https://api.qikink.com/

Additionally, it's essential to note that we will decline requests received via unsecure HTTP. Only HTTPS requests are allowed, and requests from localhost are permitted.

What is a ClientId ?

ClientId is a unique identification number for your Qikink account can be found at dashboard.qikink.com -> Integration -> Custom API. It's the same for both the Sandbox and Live endpoints.

Rate limit Exceed -You can made a request within the rate limit period
For every [ 1 ] minute ( 60 sec ) You can made 30 requests
after the 31st request on that minute you will get the
['error' => 'Rate limit exceeded. Try again later. You can access api 30 times per minute'].

item.name: Authorization

request.description:
Parameters

ClientId - This is a unique identification number for your Qikink account and can be located at dashboard.qikink.com under the Integration -> Custom API section. It remains the same for both the Sandbox and Live endpoints.

client_secret - This serves as a unique secret key for your Qikink account and can also be found at dashboard.qikink.com under the Integration -> Custom API section. However, it will differ between the Sandbox and Live endpoints.

Response

ClientId - Again, this is the unique identification number for your Qikink account, accessible at dashboard.qikink.com under the Integration -> Custom API section. It remains consistent for both the Sandbox and Live endpoints.

Accesstoken - This token is generated each time you call this endpoint and is used to access all other endpoints. Previous token will be overwritten when new token is generated.

expires_in - Indicates the expiration time of the Accesstoken in seconds.

header.value: ci_session=19vrhbb899p0qr8e93vlh6o94kt28sen; expires=Wed, 06 Sep 2023 11:41:33 GMT; Max-Age=7200; path=/; HttpOnly; SameSite=Lax

item.description: The Authorization API is designed to provide you with an access_token, which is essential for accessing all other endpoints.

item.name: Orders

request.description:
Parameters

order_number - String. Required. A unique number that has not been used before.

qikink_shipping - Numeric. Required. Either '0' or '1'. 0 means Selft Shipping and 1 means Qikink will handle the product's shipment.

gateway - String. Required. Either 'COD' or 'Prepaid'. Choose 'PREPAID' if the customer has already made the payment to your bank account. Select 'COD' if the customer intends to make the payment upon delivery.

total_order_value - Numeric. Required. This represents the total retail price or the amount charged to your customer for the order.

line_items - Array. Required. A list of products that need to be processed within the order.

shipping_address - Array. Required if Qikink_Shipping is 1. Contains the details of the shipping address.

Line Item Parameters

search_from_my_products - Numeric. Required. Either 0 or 1. If 0, you must provide design details in the 'designs' parameter. If 1, design details will be fetched from your products using the SKU field.

print_type_id - Numeric. Required If ''search_from_my_products' is 0'. Print_type_id values are 1,2,3,5,6,7,8,9,12,13,14,15,17

1 - DTG

2 - All over Printed Products

3 - Embroidery

5 - Accessories

6 - Puff print

7 - Glow-In-Dark

12 - Rainbow Vinyl Printing

13 - Gold Vinyl Printing

14 - Silver Vinyl Printing

15 - Reflective Grey Vinyl Printing

17 - DTF

quantity - Numeric. Required. The number of products that need to be processed. Minimum value is 1, maximum is 100.

sku - String. Required. If 'search_from_my_products' is 0, mention any SKU from the SKU description page (dashboard.qikink.com -> Products -> SKU Descriptions). If 'search_from_my_products' is 1, mention any SKU from your My Products page (dashboard.qikink.com -> Products -> My Products).

designs - Array. Required if 'search_from_my_products' is 0. Contains design details.

Designs Parameters

design_code - String. Required. Existing design code, which can be found in dashboard.qikink.com -> Designs -> My Designs -> List View. Alternatively, enter a new design code to create a new design in your account.

width_inches - Number. Required. Width of the design in Inches. Leave it blank if 'design_code' already exists.

height_inches - Number. Required. Height of the design in Inches. Leave it blank if 'design_code' already exists.

placement_sku - String. Required. "fr" => "Front", "bk" => "Back", "lp" => "LeftPocket", "rp" => "RightPocket", "rs" => "RightShoulder", "ls" => "LeftShoulder". Leave it blank if 'design_code' already exists.

design_url - String. Required. Link to the design that needs to be printed. Leave it blank if 'design_code' already exists.

mockup_url - String. Required. Link to the mockup that combines the design and product.

Leave it blank if 'design_code' already exists.

Shipping Address Parameters

first_name - String. Required.
last_name - String. Optional.

address1 - String. Required.
address2 - String. Optional.

Phone - String. Required.
email - String. Required.
city - String. Required.
zip - Number. Required.

province - String. Required. Valid State name with correct spelling.

country_code - String. Required. List of countries that are available listed below.

[
        "country_name": "Afghanistan",
        "country_code": "AF

request.description:
"id" is order_id (OPTIONAL)
"from_date" is Order List from (OPTIONAL)
"to_date" is Orderl ist To (OPTIONAL)

item.description: The Orders API enables you to create orders without the need to access the Qikink dashboard. Initially, the Create Order functionality is available.
